objective: Compare subagent behavior with OpenRouter vs Kimi to determine if failures are provider-specific
description: Run identical subagent tasks through OpenRouter to see if the same failures (command lane timeout, registry settlement) occur. This isolates whether the issue is Kimi-specific or an OpenClaw infrastructure problem.

spawn_configs.task: Count from 1 to 50000, return the last number. Do this by iterating in Python.

detect.provider_specific: If OpenRouter fails with same error, it's infrastructure; if not, it's Kimi-specific
